title: Cash bounty scout: 12 candidates, no safe PR route
channel: GitHub issue /attempt + fork PR + /claim where allowed

evidence.summary: NO-GO / NO_CHANNEL — Algora $1 cash/platform. Issue open and exact one-line config fix was locally verified with npm run typecheck && npm run build, but repo is archived/read-only and issue is locked; /attempt comment failed and PR route is blocked.

NO-GO / NO_CHANNEL — Algora $1 cash/platform. Issue open and config fix was locally verified, but same archived/read-only repo blocks comment/PR. Local diff was reverted to avoid stale workspace pollution.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora $140 cash/platform. Cash route exists, but issue requires prompt/provenance disclosure style metadata in PR and repo has heavy AI/spam history. Standing rules block system/instruction disclosure; existing HOLD is reclassified as rejected.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora $1 cash/platform. $1 amount itself is acceptable and the code fix is small, but acceptance text requires PR body to start with system prompt and .audit.json with full initialization payload. Blocked before implementation.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora $35 cash/platform. Requires .contributor.json containing full first-message/session initialization and has many closed duplicate PRs including prior Hermes. System-prompt disclosure + duplicate risk.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora route visible; amount unclear in current issue body/comments. Open but assigned to another user, multiple submitted/open PRs (#291/#299/#303/#305 etc.) and active claim comments. Approval odds poor; no duplicate data PR.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora route visible; amount unclear in current issue body/comments. Multiple existing claim PRs and Algora bot warns another user already attempted. Low-diff data entry is crowded.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora route visible; amount unclear in current issue body/comments. Several PRs already claim or add QCon (#282/#288/#297/#299/#300/#295). Do not add another duplicate.
NO-GO / PAYMENT_UNCLEAR — BTC bounty, not cash/platform. Bounty appears BTC-only and existing open/closed PRs already address the issue. Wallet/address path would be L4 and duplicate risk is high.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — BTC bounty, not cash/platform. Existing PR #5646 is open and several recent closed PRs already implement the exact trailing-& fix. Payout rail also wallet-based.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Bounty label, payout amount/rail not explicit in fetched issue. Many open PRs (#256/#259/#260/#261/#263/#265/#266/#267) and active claim comments cover the moved-import fix. No new PR.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — No explicit bounty label on fetched issue. Issue is open but already has many duplicate open PRs (#239/#253/#257/#258/#266/#267/#271/#272). Not a safe direct-payout candidate.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 12개 검색 및 preflight 확인.
docs-old $1 micro-bounty는 금액/난이도는 적합했지만 archived/read-only라 PR 채널 없음.
스피커/tscircuit/flyde/algora 후보는 중복 PR·active attempts가 많아 추가 제출 부적합.
UnsafeLabs 후보는 시스템 프롬프트/초기화 payload 공개 요구로 차단.
구현/PR 제출로 전환할 standing-approval 후보 없음; 기준 기대 순수익 0.

next_action: 다음 bounty scout는 archived:false, comments<10, open PR count low, no prompt-disclosure requirement, cash/platform claim route clear인 doc/test/typo micro-bounty를 우선 검색.
